nodes.label: Core Skill
nodes.description: The starting point of your skill tree.

linkedItem.name: Magic Light
linkedItem.description: A blast of magical light that can do damage at short range.

linkedItem.name: Inner Hearth
linkedItem.description: Adds +5 to HP, MP and SP

linkedItem.name: Leadership
linkedItem.description: You have basic training in giving guidance and leadership

linkedItem.name: Power Strike
linkedItem.description: Wind up a big swing, though slightly slower, you add damage to a successful attack. +1d6 Dmg

linkedItem.name: Focus attack
linkedItem.description: Hone in on a specific weakness of the enemy. +1d8 Dmg

linkedItem.name: Meditation
linkedItem.description: Find a moment of calm and regain some SP

linkedItem.name: Paralyzing Grasp
linkedItem.description: Hit an opponent with a paralyzing effect by grasping a weak point. If unable to make the save, Stuns for 6 actions.

linkedItem.name: Healing touch
linkedItem.description: Mend together wounds with magical threads and regain HP for a target.

linkedItem.name: Magic bolt
linkedItem.description: A strong blast of magic that has a further range and does a bit more damage at a cost.

linkedItem.name: Poison Touch
linkedItem.description: Inject your magical energy into your enemy as it chews away at them from the inside.

linkedItem.name: Glowing Presence
linkedItem.description: Wraps you in a soft illumination that gives a pleasant glow. Makes a dark room a little brighter. Makes you a little more appealing but lowers your ability to hide.

linkedItem.name: Unlock
linkedItem.description: Unlock a door with finesse.

linkedItem.name: Investigation Guide
linkedItem.description: Illuminates items in the room, of significance to help with an investigation. Gives advantage to awareness checks.

linkedItem.name: Charming Wit
linkedItem.description: You exude a certain something that just makes you a bit more charming. A touch of whimsy perhaps? Or maybe you smell good.

linkedItem.name: Thick Skin
linkedItem.description: Toughen up! Adds +1 to your AC.

linkedItem.name: Quick to Act
linkedItem.description: Add +1 Actions per round.

linkedItem.name: Discount
linkedItem.description: Compels a merchant to give a discount % equal to the amount you roll on a D20.

linkedItem.name: Agreeable
linkedItem.description: Will slightly make someone more agreeable through magical suggestion. Will only work on people who already have a good opinion of you. (Not mind control)

linkedItem.name: Calm Emotions
linkedItem.description: Fills a target creature with an overwhelming peace on a successful roll.

linkedItem.name: Helping Wisp
linkedItem.description: Find direction and guidance and summon a small wisp of light that will lead you towards a desired direction. Makes you much more visible.

linkedItem.name: Bind Souls
linkedItem.description: Allows one to connect two targets to each other. If one dies, so does the other. A contested roll determines if it takes effect. The casters Lore skill vs. the targets Influence skill. Targets can elect to fail.

linkedItem.name: Crowd Control
linkedItem.description: Disperse a large cloud of mana. Caster can dictate what effect it has on anyone in the area. Options range from, calming effects to itchiness or burning sensations, nausea or even elation.

linkedItem.name: Discern
linkedItem.description: Allows you to tell if someone is saying something they themselves do not believe to be true.

linkedItem.name: Sentry Alarm
linkedItem.description: Create a field around you and your allies that, if broken by a creature of ill intent, will set off an alarm and notify you.

linkedItem.name: Mind Grazing
linkedItem.description: Sift the thoughts of a target creature and glean the basic surface things they are thinking about.

linkedItem.name: Reveal
linkedItem.description: Push your magic presence out from yourself and reveal any nearby hidden doors or traps, or possible invisible people or objects.

linkedItem.name: Provoke
linkedItem.description: Causes a target to focus its attention on you only. Causes it to have disadvantage if it focuses anywhere else.

linkedItem.name: Lie Detector
linkedItem.description: Create an area around you which causes any person within to glow red or green to different extents. The more red they glow, the more they do not believe their statement to be true. A green glow correlated to how truthful they are being.

linkedItem.name: Diversion
linkedItem.description: Cause a diversion that brings attention to one location and away from another. Make a contested roll, using any skill against the targets awareness skill.

linkedItem.name: Hide
linkedItem.description: Quick! HIDE! Gain +5 to stealth and advantage on stealth rolls for as long as you remain hidden. Requires a place to hide.

linkedItem.name: Water Breathing
linkedItem.description: Allows up to 30 mins of breathing normally underwater.

linkedItem.name: Sixth Sense
linkedItem.description: Caster effectively cannot be surprised as you are aware of everything happening 6 seconds in the future for the next hour.

linkedItem.name: Guiding Light
linkedItem.description: At DM discretion, will create a beam of light leading to whatever would be most helpful at the given moment.

linkedItem.name: Mark
linkedItem.description: Places a Mark on a target that relays their location back to you. Takes a substantial amount of Mana. Lowers your MAX MP for as long as it is active.

linkedItem.name: Invisibility
linkedItem.description: Cause your body to go almost entirely opaque. Massive bonus to Stealth stat.

linkedItem.name: Item History
linkedItem.description: Similar to identify, can tell you past about an item. Vague sense of where it has been or who has owned it. Stronger sense, the longer it has stayed in one place or belonged to one person.

linkedItem.name: Sense Magic
linkedItem.description: Feel the residual magic in an area affected by magic. Can tell if object is magical.

linkedItem.name: Forage I
linkedItem.description: When in a survival situation, allows you to gather provisions for the day for yourself. Build shelter and fire.

linkedItem.name: Peek
linkedItem.description: Allows you to open a view into an area within 100 yards. Viewport allows any other observer to look back through the opening as it opens an equal sized view back to the caster. Nothing can pass through the opening, only light.

linkedItem.name: Teleport
linkedItem.description: Open a gateway for yourself and one other person of equal or smaller size to travel to any point you have already been to within one mile.

linkedItem.name: Retrace
linkedItem.description: Illuminate the paths on the ground and allow the ability to distinguish between different paths from different targets. Footprints from less than 1 hour glow brightly, after 6 hours are faint and hard to follow, after one day footprints are nearly untraceable.

linkedItem.name: Forage II
linkedItem.description: Allows you to gather food and water for a day for 6 people. Also allows you to create shelter and a fire. While in your Sheltered space you have advantage on all survival checks.

linkedItem.name: Tame
linkedItem.description: When encountering a non-humanoid creature of animal intelligence, below the level of sapience, you may make a contested roll against the creatures awareness vs your influence to attempt to tame it. You may make 1 attempt per day.

linkedItem.name: Icy Blast
linkedItem.description: Blast your foe with a chilling blast that lowers their Initiative and slows them down.

linkedItem.name: Firebolt
linkedItem.description: Send a blast of fire at your enemy. On a failed save, they catch on fire.

linkedItem.name: Slow field
linkedItem.description: Lower the Initiative of everyone who is in the radius of the spell.

linkedItem.name: Fire Blast
linkedItem.description: Send out a large blast of flames engulfing a small area. Chance to catch fire.

linkedItem.name: Focused Beam
linkedItem.description: Send out a hyper focused beam of heat at your enemy, dealing a massive amount of damage.

linkedItem.name: Firestorm
linkedItem.description: Create a blast engulfing a huge area around your enemies. Chance to ignite the enemies caught in the blast.

linkedItem.name: Magic Armor
linkedItem.description: Create a layer of magic over your body raising your AC.

linkedItem.name: Accelerate
linkedItem.description: Speed up your reaction time with a boosted jolt of magic.

linkedItem.name: Deepen the Well
linkedItem.description: You gain a deeper pool of points to draw from. Increase your HP, MP or SP by 10.

linkedItem.name: Ephemeral Strength
linkedItem.description: Boost your strength for a short period of time.

linkedItem.name: Shadow Cover
linkedItem.description: Give you and your allies cover in the imeadiate area around you.

linkedItem.name: Radiant Charm
linkedItem.description: Increases your influence ability by a great deal.

linkedItem.name: Burn Life
linkedItem.description: Grip the well of your lifeforce and siphon it into your MP.

linkedItem.name: Magic armor II
linkedItem.description: Double wrap your body in Mana allowing you to resist attack as well as providing a temporary boost in MAX HP.

linkedItem.name: Fog of Hiding
linkedItem.description: Let out a large cloud of disguising fog and give you and your nearby allies a large boost to your stealth stat.

linkedItem.name: Lower Guard
linkedItem.description: Infuse your weapon with a staggering effect. On a failed save, their AC will be greatly lowered.

linkedItem.name: Chant of Knowing
linkedItem.description: Take a moment to Chant and gain an understanding from the deeper planes of existance.

linkedItem.name: Weakness
linkedItem.description: Cast a weakness on your target lowering their physical ability for a short time.

linkedItem.name: Blind
linkedItem.description: Drop a flash that lowers Awareness by a large amount.

linkedItem.name: Flash Stun
linkedItem.description: Drop a flash stun to stun nearby enemies

linkedItem.name: Poison Fog
linkedItem.description: Send out a poison cloud of damaging gas to nearby enemies.

linkedItem.name: Vampiric Drain
linkedItem.description: Drain the life from your enemy and make it yours.

linkedItem.name: Miasma
linkedItem.description: Disperse a thick fog that lowers almost all abilities by a small amount and begins poison damage.

linkedItem.name: Nightshade
linkedItem.description: Devastating multi layered poison attack. The more the enemy misses the save by, the more damage they will take.

linkedItem.name: Mana Drain
linkedItem.description: Drain the mana from an enemy and gain half of what you take.

linkedItem.name: Sleep cloud
linkedItem.description: Disperse a cloud of sleeping gas that knocks out Enemies in the area affected.

linkedItem.name: Petrification
linkedItem.description: Hit one enemy with an overwhelming petrification effect.

linkedItem.name: Rushing Flurry
linkedItem.description: Fly into a furious cornucopia of fists. Attacking everyone around you. A quick attack doing 3d4 dmg to everyone in nearby range.

linkedItem.name: Shatter Stomp
linkedItem.description: Create an area of effect hit for everyone sharing your space. weapon +2d4 Dmg

linkedItem.name: Blinding Strike
linkedItem.description: Slash out across peoples eyes near you and blind people for a bit.

linkedItem.name: Internal Strike
linkedItem.description: Find the gaps in the armor and lower the AC of the enemy you attack.

linkedItem.name: Furious Flurry
linkedItem.description: Fly into a swarm of attacks to everyone in your "far" reach. Does 2d6 damage to everyone around you.

linkedItem.name: Wrathful Strike
linkedItem.description: Do massive damage to a target by doubling the power your weapon does on an attack.

linkedItem.name: Harden body
linkedItem.description: Focus your stamina inward and harden yourself against an attack for 3 rounds. +2 AC

linkedItem.name: Hearth Breathing
linkedItem.description: Restore some HP by channeling your SP into your lifeforce. +1d6 HP

linkedItem.name: Boost Physicality
linkedItem.description: Use your SP to boost your physical ability by a large amount for a short period of time.

linkedItem.name: Sharpen Awareness
linkedItem.description: Heighten your awareness by a great level for a short period of time.

linkedItem.name: Fortress
linkedItem.description: Boost your AC by a very large amount for a short period of time.

linkedItem.name: Healing embrace
linkedItem.description: Heal the allies sharing your space by 1d10

linkedItem.name: Slap
linkedItem.description: A fast attack to stun your opponent for only a moment.

linkedItem.name: Keen Mind
linkedItem.description: Take a moment to think deeply and add a large amount to your Lore stat.

linkedItem.name: War Cry
linkedItem.description: Shout to boost you and your allies Max HP and initiative.

linkedItem.name: Knock Knock
linkedItem.description: Knock an enemy back with your attack 2 spaces.

linkedItem.name: Dull Pain
linkedItem.description: Allow your body to accept more damage and in the process run off of SP instead of HP.

linkedItem.name: Hemorage
linkedItem.description: Use an attack to add bleeding damage over time. Target will bleed 1d4 Dmg over 3 rounds unless a save is made.

linkedItem.name: Hamstring
linkedItem.description: A quick strike at the speed of the opponent. Slow the enemy down by -7 Initiative for 6 rounds until a save is made.

linkedItem.name: Anthem
linkedItem.description: Shout out to your allies and boost their initiative by 5 for everyone.

linkedItem.name: Usurper
linkedItem.description: Gain HP by doing damage to your opponent.

linkedItem.name: Quick Strike
linkedItem.description: Get your hit off first. +10 initiative to a single weapon strike.

linkedItem.name: Trade Blows
linkedItem.description: Do double damage on your attack but give your target advantage on their next attack.

linkedItem.name: Parry
linkedItem.description: Pull target in. Do damage, give disadvantage.

linkedItem.name: Rage
linkedItem.description: You fly into a furious rage for 3 rounds. You have one extra action each round, advantage on all attacks, +5 to initiative. You also however have a -5 to your AC and -1d20 on Awareness.

linkedItem.name: Hobble
linkedItem.description: Massively slow down the enemy and remove one of their actions for 3 rounds.

linkedItem.name: Song of Victory
linkedItem.description: Sing out a song of victory that gives everyone around you Advantage on their next 3 actions.

linkedItem.name: Perceptive Gaze
linkedItem.description: You take in so much and see so deeply, +2 to Awareness.

linkedItem.name: Core Skill Enhance
linkedItem.description: Add +2 to any core skill of your choice.

linkedItem.name: Deepen the Well
linkedItem.description: You gain a deeper pool of points to draw from. Increase your HP, MP or SP by 10.

linkedItem.name: Survivalist
linkedItem.description: You become a master of survival tactics and methods. Gain advantage on all survival checks.

linkedItem.name: Terrifying Presence
linkedItem.description: You have a presence that can best be described as oppressive. The attention can be distracting though. +3 influence, -2 awareness.

linkedItem.name: Eldritch Knowledge
linkedItem.description: What decrepit tomes of knowledge did you have to leaf through to gain this cursed wisdom? +3 Lore and advantage on Lore checks having to do with creatures outside this realm.(DM discretion)

linkedItem.name: Deepen the Well
linkedItem.description: You gain a deeper pool of points to draw from. Increase your HP, MP or SP by 10.

linkedItem.name: Core Skill Enhance
linkedItem.description: Add +2 to any core skill of your choice.

linkedItem.name: Core Skill Enhance
linkedItem.description: Add +2 to any core skill of your choice.

linkedItem.name: Fast Fingers
linkedItem.description: Whether drawing your sword or getting a spell off, your practiced movements help you act quickly. +5 to Initiative.

linkedItem.name: Core Skill Enhance
linkedItem.description: Add +2 to any core skill of your choice.

linkedItem.name: Deepen the Well
linkedItem.description: You gain a deeper pool of points to draw from. Increase your HP, MP or SP by 10.

linkedItem.name: The Star
linkedItem.description: You are the star of the show. You are the guiding light, everything seems to revolve around you. That does however make it quite hard to hide. +5 influence, -4 Stealth

linkedItem.name: Smooth talker
linkedItem.description: You can chat the pants off just about anybody. advantage for influence rolls.

linkedItem.name: Heavy attacker
linkedItem.description: You lose some speed but you gain some power. +3 to Physical and -5 to initative.

linkedItem.name: Peerless Strength
linkedItem.description: Your strength is untouchable, but it also makes you a little unlikable. +4 Physical, -5 influence

linkedItem.name: Elusive shape
linkedItem.description: You become very difficult to perceive, though this lowers your defence and makes you a bit hard to hear. -2 physical -2 influence +6 stealth

linkedItem.name: Deepen the Well
linkedItem.description: You gain a deeper pool of points to draw from. Increase your HP, MP or SP by 10.

linkedItem.name: Core Skill Enhance
linkedItem.description: Add +2 to any core skill of your choice.

linkedItem.name: Core Skill Enhance
linkedItem.description: Add +2 to any core skill of your choice.

linkedItem.name: Overcasting
linkedItem.description: Allows you to pull MP from a deeper well. Your very life force itself (HP).

linkedItem.name: Deepen the Well
linkedItem.description: You gain a deeper pool of points to draw from. Increase your HP, MP or SP by 10.

linkedItem.name: Greed is Good
linkedItem.description: Anytime you gain coin, double what you would have earned. This comes at a great cost.

linkedItem.name: Lore keeper
linkedItem.description: You have been selected. You are the keeper of secrets, the dark things need knowing. You have advantage on Lore rolls but at a cost of your physical strength.

linkedItem.name: Harden shell
linkedItem.description: You seem to almost grow a carapace. It's... unnerving. +3 AC -1 Influence

linkedItem.name: A Running Stream
linkedItem.description: You feel that you can go forever. Your SP can be fully depleted and when you need it, you can burn your very life force to continue.

linkedItem.name: Discerning
linkedItem.description: Your life of quiet practice has whittled you away, but you have gained understanding. You're awareness deepens and with it your new awareness you can avoid detection. You can see what comes next and where to be and when to be there. +3 stealth and +3 awareness -5 physical.

armor.name: Fine Leather Armor
armor.description: Tanned skins of a bear hide finely embellished with filigree and red thread stitching.

armor.name: Chainmail Armor
armor.description: A finely woven metal chain outfit, allowing for flexibility but still having decent protection.

armor.name: Plate Armor
armor.description: A heavy but very strong armor. Slows down your movement on the battlefield and weak to bludgeoning attacks.

armor.name: Mages robes
armor.description: Robes designed to help channel mana through you more efficently.

armor.name: Darkened Wrappings
armor.description: Allows you to better hide in shadow.

armor.name: Training Garments
armor.description: Allows you to use your Stamina more efficently.

weapons.name: Short Sword
weapons.description: It gleams with a sinister energy.

weapons.name: Long Sword
weapons.description: A little heavier to wield but feels great in the hand.

weapons.name: Morning Star
weapons.description: A brutal looking weapon that's guaranteed to leave a mark.

weapons.name: Heavy Crossbow
weapons.description: A powerful weapon doing great damage from far away.

weapons.name: Spear
weapons.description: A long weapon with considerable reach.

weapons.name: Battle Axe
weapons.description: A powerful weapon best for felling trees but great for hurting people in a pinch.

weapons.name: Heavy Club
weapons.description: A powerful weapon that does some fairly heavy damage but takes a while to swing and carry around.

weapons.name: Small Shield
weapons.description: Able to use to bash an opponent

accessories.name: Necklace of Stealth
accessories.description: The harder you look at it, the more difficult it becomes to percieve.

accessories.name: Rune of Equinimity
accessories.description: Wear this to protect your mind from attack. Mind reading or influence skills have no effect on you while wearing.

consumables.name: Potion of Healing
consumables.description: A small potion for restoring a little health.

consumables.name: Potion of greater healing
consumables.description: Heals a large amount of health
